description_for_human: Principal-protected yield shields on Mantle. Agents recommend, prepare, and activate shields on a user's behalf with a session key.
description_for_model: Aegis lets agents call /api/ai/recommend-shield, /api/yield-shield/prepare, /api/yield-shield/activate on behalf of a user using a Bearer session key (aegis_sk_...). Strategy skills live under /api/skills/. See /api/skills/aegis.skill.md for the entrypoint.
